data.title: Patriot Principles Project starts with billboards in N.C., focuses on immigration and Christian values.
data.description: In Wilmington and Winston-Salem, North Carolina, the Patriot Principles Project was officially inaugurated on January 9, 2026. This initiative focuses on safeguarding common principles and promoting policies that prioritize the well-being of all Americans. The launch of the Project marked the beginning of its mission to advocate for these principles.

data.title: Gifthealth opens new pharmacy in Mesa, Arizona, marking expansion into the Southwest. Celebrates milestone.
data.description: Gifthealth, a unified digital pharmacy platform, recently marked a major achievement with the inauguration of its advanced pharmacy in Mesa, Arizona on January 9, 2026. This new location signifies Gifthealth's venture into the Southwest region and showcases their commitment to growth and innovation in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Global smart home market expected to grow from USD 133.3 billion in 2023 to USD 1.03 trillion by 2035.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Smart Home Market has been recently released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The forecast predicts substantial growth in the global smart home market, expecting a rise from USD 133.3 billion in 2023 to an impressive USD 1.03 trillion by 2035. The report delves into various aspects such as the distribution by type of products, protocol, application, software & services, end-user, sales channel, and key geographical regions. This indicates a lucrative trend in the industry with significant opportunities for expansion and innovation.

data.title: Flo Health's Flo Period & Pregnancy Tracker app wins Google Play "Best of 2025" Award for Watches in Hong Kong, Taiwan, and Macau.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in London, Flo Health, the creator of the widely-used Flo App and the top women's health app globally, revealed that the Flo Period & Pregnancy Tracker received the prestigious Google Play Best of 2025 Award. The app was recognized in the category of Best for Watches, solidifying its position as the number one women's health app worldwide.

data.title: Beta Bionics misses key targets, but reports $32M Q4 revenue, up 56% YoY, with 35,000+ users, double from previous year.
data.description: Beta Bionics Inc. (NASDAQ: BBNX) announced strong preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 results, with net sales projected to surpass $32 million, indicating a 56% year-over-year surge from the estimated $28.19 million. Durable Medical Equipment (DME) channel sales are expected to hit a minimum of $22.3 million, a rise of at least 23%. Revenue from the Pharmacy Benefit Plan (PBP) channel is anticipated to reach at least $9.7 million, from $2.4 million in the prior year. The company forecasts its user base to exceed 35,000, more than doubling the 15,298 users recorded a year ago. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Helen of Troy's Q3 earnings in line with expectations, sales surpass, but they lower outlook; EPS cut to $3.25-$3.75.
data.description: Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) reported its third-quarter earnings with adjusted earnings per share at $1.71, in line with analyst expectations. Although the quarterly sales of $512.829 million exceeded projections of $503.587 million, representing a 3.4% decrease year over year. The company adjusted its fiscal 2026 earnings per share forecast to a range of $3.25 to $3.75, down from the previous outlook of $3.75 to $4.25. This new range falls below the analyst estimate of $4.02. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Citigroup expected to report Q4 earnings of $1.62/share, up from $1.35/share a year ago. Revenue estimate - $20.45 billion.
data.description: Citigroup Inc. is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, Jan. 14, 2025. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.62 per share, a notable increase from $1.35 per share in the same quarter last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $20.45 billion, up from $19.58 billion a year ago. The recent decision to sell AO Citibank represents Citigroup's final move to exit its operations in Russia. Following this news, Citigroup's stock closed at $120.60 on Thursday, reflecting a 0.6% decrease. For additional insights and analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on the Benzinga platform.

data.title: BitGo helps iPower with digital asset treasury transactions, including BTC and ETH purchases through BitGo Bank & Trust.
data.description: BitGo Holdings Inc. assisted iPower Inc. (Nasdaq: IPW) in executing and safeguarding its digital asset treasury deals. iPower bought Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) via BitGo Bank & Trust. The transactions, facilitated by BitGo Prime's OTC trading services, were successfully completed.
